response.justification: Mohammed possesses an exceptionally strong technical background with over 15 years of software development experience and highly relevant expertise in testing infrastructure, CI/CD, and developer tools. However, the resume lacks any indication of formal people management experience, which is a strict minimum requirement for this Level II Engineering Manager role. While he demonstrates technical leadership as a Staff Engineer and open-source contributor, the absence of direct reports, 1:1s, and performance management makes him unsuited for a mid-to-senior full-time people-leadership position.
strengths: Extensive 15+ years of software development experience, well beyond the 8-year minimum requirement.
Strong domain expertise in engineering productivity, having built testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), CI/CD pipelines, and device orchestration tools.
Direct experience with mobile platform ecosystems, including native iOS development and mobile device orchestration.
concerns: Complete lack of formal people management experience; no evidence of conducting 1:1s, performance reviews, or managing direct reports.
Career trajectory has remained strictly within Individual Contributor (IC) roles (Senior/Staff Developer) rather than transitioning to engineering management.
No demonstrated experience leading broad organizational change or setting strategic cross-team priorities at a management level.
